description: MNTN, Inc., a performance TV software company, provides performance advertising services in the United States. The company offers Performance TV software platform, enables marketers to target audiences through MNTN Matched technology and then directly attribute each view to a purchase or other action. Its platform provides segmentation tools, intelligent campaign planning, advance audience targeting, prospecting, creative ad builder, and data analytics reporting. MNTN, Inc. was formerly known as Steel House, Inc. and changed its name to MNTN, Inc. in June 2021. The company was incorporated in 2009 and is headquartered in Austin, Texas.
